provisions.description: Prohibits reprogramming of funds in Title I that creates/initiates or eliminates programs; increases funds denied by Congress; redirects specific-activity funds; or augments/reduces programs beyond specified thresholds, without prior approval from Appropriations Committees. Also sets a de minimis floor of $50,000 below which reprogramming requests shall not be submitted. Exempts continuing authorities program projects from the new-program restriction.

Subsection (c) exempts continuing authorities program from the new-program restriction in (a)(1)

provisions.description: Establishes Outer Continental Shelf inspection fee schedule for FY2026. Secretary shall collect nonrefundable inspection fees deposited in the Offshore Safety and Environmental Enforcement account. Sets annual fees for above-waterline facilities ($10,500/$17,000/$31,500 based on well count), per-inspection fees for drilling rigs ($30,500/$16,700 based on water depth), and per-inspection fees for non-rig unit well operations ($13,260/$11,530/$4,470 based on water depth).
provisions.title: I
provisions.raw_text: SEC. 107. (a) In fiscal year 2026, the Secretary of the Interior shall collect a nonrefundable inspection fee, which shall be deposited in the ''Offsh
notes: Fees deposited in Offshore Safety and Environmental Enforcement account
Subsection (b) annual facility fees: $10,500 (no wells, with processing/gathering), $17,000 (1-10 wells), $31,500 (more than 10 wells)
Subsection (c) drilling rig fees: $30,500 (500+ ft water depth), $16,700 (less than 500 ft)
Subsection (d) non-rig unit fees: $13,260 (2,500+ ft), $11,530 (500-2,499 ft), $4,470 (less than 500 ft)
Subsection (e) establishes billing and payment schedules

provisions.description: Establishes detailed procedures and deadlines for the allocation of Land and Water Conservation Fund and National Parks and Public Land Legacy Restoration Fund monies for FY2026 and FY2025 revisions. Requires Secretaries of the Interior and Agriculture to allocate funds to specified projects within 45 days, submit project lists and data sheets within 30 days, provide supplementary allocation lists, and submit quarterly reports on fund balances.
deadlines: Within 45 days of enactment: allocate LWCF FY2026 funds per explanatory statement (except BLM, FWS, NPS Land Acquisition Projects)
Within 30 days of enactment: Secretary of Interior to provide project lists with data sheets for BLM, FWS, NPS Land Acquisition Projects
Within 45 days of reprogramming approval: Secretary of Interior to allocate BLM, FWS, NPS Land Acquisition funds
Within 45 days of enactment: allocate LWCF FY2025 revision funds per explanatory statement
Within 30 days of enactment: project lists for National Parks and Public Land Legacy Restoration Fund
Within 45 days of reprogramming approval: allocate Legacy Restoration Fund amounts
Concurrent with FY2027 President's budget: supplementary allocation lists and project data sheets
provisions.title: IV
provisions.raw_text: Within 45 days of enactment of this Act, the Secretary of the Interior and the Secretary of Agriculture, as appropriate, shall allocate amounts made available for expenditure from the Land and Water Conservation Fund
notes: Subsection (a)(1): Allocate LWCF FY2026 funds per explanatory statement table, except BLM/FWS/NPS Land Acquisition Projects

Subsection (a)(2): Secretary of Interior provides BLM/FWS/NPS project lists within 30 days; supplementary allocations totaling at least half of each account's allocation; expenditure is a reprogramming subject to SEC. 421
Subsection (a)(3): Requires 30-day written notice before expending funds on projects outside specific tracts described in project data sheets
Subsection (c): Future budget submission requirements including supplementary allocation lists and project data sheets for FY2027
Subsection (c)(3): Projects must have a willing seller and initiated appraisal/market research
Subsection (c)(5): Quarterly reports on status of LWCF and Legacy Restoration Fund balances
Subsection (d): FY2025 LWCF revision allocations within 45 days
